Empowering communities together

India's #1 Civic
Issue Reporting Portal

File complaints, track solutions, and coordinate with municipal officers to repair roads, fix streetlights, clean garbage, and rebuild your neighborhood.

File a ComplaintView Dashboard

How CiviFix Helps Your City

Report issues in seconds, track actions, and coordinate with municipal officers to resolve public issues quickly and efficiently.

Step 01

Report

Snap a photo, select the issue category (road damage, streetlights, garbage), choose the ward, and submit in seconds.

Step 02

Assign

Municipal administrators inspect your report and automatically dispatch the designated inspector and field workers.

Step 03

Resolve

Assigned field workers repair the issue, snap a resolution photo, and submit it for validation by the ward inspector.

Step 04

Track

Monitor progress in real-time through an interactive status timeline. Receive instant alerts on your portal.

CiviFixMunicipal Portal
